tasks.compile:all: deno compile --allow-net --allow-run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output dist/hook-darwin-arm64 src/main.ts && deno compile --allow-net --allow-run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --target x86_64-apple-darwin --output dist/hook-darwin-x86_64 src/main.ts
tasks.release: deno task compile && mkdir -p /usr/local/bin && mv hook /usr/local/bin/hook && echo 'Installed → /usr/local/bin/hook'
